CheckTitle: Ensure app registrations do not have expired or expiring credentials
Description: Checks all app registrations for client secrets or certificates that are already expired or will expire within 30 days.
Risk: Expired credentials cause authentication failures and service outages. Long-lived or unmonitored secrets are a top credential theft vector — attackers extract them from code repos, config files, and compromised endpoints.

Remediation.Recommendation: Rotate or remove expired credentials. For active applications, replace secrets with certificates or federated identity credentials (workload identity federation). Set a maximum credential lifetime policy and monitor expiration dates.
